title: Demo Screenshot and Hero Image for README

description.summary: Add demo screenshots of the TC dashboard and individual TC record HTML pages to the README for visual impact in registry PR reviews
description.motivation: The 6 open PRs across skill registries lack visual proof of what the skill produces. A hero image showing the dark-theme dashboard and a TC record page would make the PRs significantly more compelling and help drive adoption.
description.detailed_design: Generate fresh example data with multiple TCs in various states, capture screenshots of the dashboard and a TC record page, add to README with descriptive alt text. Consider a single composite hero image or 2-3 focused screenshots.

files_affected.description: Full-page dashboard screenshot captured via Playwright
Full-page TC record detail screenshot captured via Playwright
Added hero images with alt text after title
